title: Beach soccer empowers youth
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Several youngsters from the Crags and surrounding communities came together to participate in the Jasriel Foundation’s beach soccer tournament.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Several youngsters from the Crags and surrounding communities came together to participate in the Jasriel Foundation’s beach soccer tournament."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tournament, held on Wednesday 16 July, saw dozens of children engage in healthy competition on the sands of Central Beach."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event was a special milestone in the foundation’s ongoing community sports initiative, which has been running weekly street soccer tournaments since late last year.","html":"The event was a special milestone in the foundation’s ongoing community sports initiative, which has been running weekly street soccer tournaments since late last year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
